body:
🔴 **Design Concern** — `CHANGELOG.md:3`
`## 19.0.0 (2026-03-24)`

The previous major version `18.0.0` was released on 2025-11-18 — approximately 4 months ago, which is within the 6-month window. Frequent major version bumps introduce breaking changes for customers at a high cadence.

**Fix:** Please discuss whether this major version bump is necessary at this time, or whether it can be deferred/consolidated with a future release. If it is necessary (for example, due to a spec-side breaking change), document the justification in the PR description.

1 design concern found in this PR for `@azure/arm-appservice` (19.0.0 stable release): the previous major version `18.0.0` was released only ~4 months ago (2025-11-18), which is within the 6-month window where frequent major releases are discouraged. All other validation checks passed — versions are consistent across `package.json`, context file (`webSiteManagementContext.ts`), and `CHANGELOG.md`; no naming violations (`_N` suffixes, `AutoGenerated` tooling artifacts, or `_` prefixes) were found in the new API surface; no inappropriate `void` return types in create/get/list/update operations; no `unknown` types in public models; no `ae-forgotten-export` warnings; and no alpha-version comparisons in `CHANGELOG.md`.

<details>
<summary>📊 Structured Report</summary>

```json
{"agent":"mgmt-reviewer","pr":37789,"summary":"issues_found","findings":[{"file":"sdk/appservice/arm-appservice/CHANGELOG.md","line":3,"issueType":"design","category":"breaking-changes","description":"Major version 18.0.0 was released 2025-11-18 (~4 months ago). 19.0.0 is within the 6-month window for frequent major releases."}]}
```

</details>
